title: Entrepreneurship in the UK
body: "The UK has a strong environment for start-ups; this prospectus focuses on the actions government is taking to support scaling companies.  Reducing barriers entrepreneurs and investors is key to boosting economic growth and delivering on the vision set out in the government’s modern Industrial Strategy and Plan for Change.  Building on the significant steps this government has taken to support high-growth companies since taking office, this signals the priority areas for further action to support entrepreneurs. "
